result.summary: Zoho.eu exposes at least Zoho Desk REST API (OAuth, `Authorization: Zoho-oauthtoken`) and a Zoho Books MCP setup page; no GraphQL or CLI surface was confirmed from the EU domain docs I found.

zoho_oauth_client.label: Zoho OAuth client
zoho_oauth_client.setup: Go to [Zoho API Console](https://api-console.zoho.eu/) and create an OAuth client for the EU data center. Use the console to register the app and obtain the client credentials needed to mint access and refresh tokens for Zoho product APIs. Pick the product-specific scopes required by the API you want to call.

zoho_oauth_access_token.label: Zoho OAuth access token
zoho_oauth_access_token.setup: Mint an OAuth access token from your Zoho OAuth client in the [EU API Console](https://api-console.zoho.eu/). This is the token you send as `Authorization: Zoho-oauthtoken <access_token>` to Zoho product APIs. Refresh it with the same OAuth client when it expires.

zoho_books_mcp_oauth.label: Zoho Books MCP OAuth authorization
zoho_books_mcp_oauth.setup: Follow the Zoho Books MCP setup guide in the [Zoho Books help docs](https://www.zoho.eu/au/books/help/mcp/zoho-books-mcp.html) to connect your organization and authorize the MCP server. The page points to the Books API docs and is the place to start for the MCP connection setup.
